title: Choose the right real-time protocol fast
meta_description: Pick the right real-time protocol in 30 seconds: WebSocket vs SSE vs long polling benchmarks, latency, memory, and cost per 100k messages in 2026
prewritten_tweet:
Most teams waste $1,600/month on WebSocket infra when SSE would do.

I measured p99 latency, memory, and cost for all three.

Here is the cheat sheet 👇
